programmes.show_name: My Heart Can't Beat Unless You...
programmes.show_description: ...Tell it To: (2020) Gritty twist on the vampire trope. A sickly young vampire's brother doesn't want to kill for him any more. But as their sister says, do they really have any choice?
(2022) Eerie sci-fi horror-thriller with Maika Monroe and Jake Lacy. Extra-terrestrial forces derail a couple's romantic backpacking trip, but in a subtle, non-spaceship kind of a way.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1947) Supernatural romance starring Rex Harrison as the spirit of a gruff sea captain who haunts widow Gene Tierney, only for her to fall in love with him. Directed by Joseph L Mankiewicz.
(2006) Spooky animated caper with Maggie Gyllenhaal and Steve Buscemi. A young boy and his babysitter spy on the creepy neighbour. Did he really eat his wife?

programmes.show_name: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programmes.show_description: (1961) Sci-fi adventure starring Walter Pidgeon. Earth faces a fiery death when a meteor shower triggers a natural disaster. Can the commander of a nuclear submarine save us all?
(1992) Comedy starring Whoopi Goldberg. A casino singer who witnesses a Mob murder goes into hiding at a convent, where she soon has the choir rocking. With Maggie Smith.
(1997) Sci-fi comedy. Tommy Lee Jones and Will Smith star as top-secret agents who monitor and hush up the presence of aliens on Earth - and discover one scary critter's deadly plot.
(1999) Drama with Tom Hanks and Michael Clarke Duncan. Strange events occur when a man convicted of raping and murdering two young girls arrives on death row in a Louisiana prison.
(2010) Apocalyptic action-horror starring Paul Bettany. God's patience runs out and He decides to wipe humanity from the face of the Earth. Can a rebel archangel save us?
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
...in Their Flying Machines: (1965) Newspaper boss Robert Morley puts up a £10,000 prize for the winner of a flight from London to Paris, and soon a motley assortment of aviators is ready.
Stars Will Smith and Josh Brolin and director Barry Sonnenfeld talk about making the third sci-fi comedy adventure in the Men in Black series.
(1995) Romantic drama based on Arthurian legend, starring Richard Gere, Sean Connery and Julia Ormond. Can nomadic swordsman Lancelot contain his love for King Arthur's fiancée?
(2016) Taraji P. Henson, Octavia Spencer and Janelle Monáe star in the Oscar-nominated, fact-based drama about three women whose genius made a significant contribution to the space race.
(2002) Tommy Lee Jones and Will Smith star in the tough action sequel to their sci-fi comedy about US government agents who secretly protect Earth from extraterrestrial criminals.
Stars Will Smith and Josh Brolin and director Barry Sonnenfeld talk about making the third sci-fi comedy adventure in the Men in Black series.
(2005) Violent action-thriller starring Jason Statham as the tough courier Frank Martin, who's hired to guard a government drugs czar's son. But his mission soon lurches towards disaster.
(1990) Liam Neeson and Frances McDormand star in Sam Raimi's crime-fighting action-fantasy. A vengeful scientist invents a synthetic skin that lets him change his appearance...
